dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4811 IS: Tribal Conservation Priorities Inclusion Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Peters (for himself and Mrs. Fischer) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Food Security Act of 1985 to include Indian Tribes in certain provisions relating to priority resource concerns.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Tribal Conservation Priorities Inclusion Act.

section.header: Inclusion of Indian Tribes in provisions relating to priority resource concerns

subsection.text: Section 1240A(7) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3839aa–1(7)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting tribal, before or local; and
by inserting or an area on tribal land (as defined in section 2601 of the Energy Policy Act of 1992 (25 U.S.C. 3501)) after of a State; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (B), by inserting or on tribal land (as so defined) after State or region.

subsection.text: Section 1240I(5) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3839aa–21(5)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by inserting tribal, before or local; and
by inserting or an area on tribal land (as defined in section 2601 of the Energy Policy Act of 1992 (25 U.S.C. 3501)) after of a State; and

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (B), by inserting or on tribal land (as so defined) after State or region.

subsection.text: Section 1240K(b)(3) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3839aa–23(b)(3)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking that the Secretary determines are and inserting as the Secretary determines to be; and
by inserting tribal, before and local.

subsection.text: Section 1271F(a)(2)(C) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3871f(a)(2)(C)) is amended by inserting tribal, before or local.
Section 1201(a)(14) of the Food Security Act of 1985 (16 U.S.C. 3801(a)(14)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking section 4(e) and inserting section 4; and
